default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Final sync on launch readiness, QA findings, and bug fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Onboarding Blocker:** A P0 bug prevents users from completing onboarding with a single subcategory. The fix is to concatenate `primary_subcategory_id` with `subcategory_ids` in the validation guard.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [**Billing Live:** The billing system is in production, connected to Stripe's sandbox for safe testing of subscription flows (upgrades, downgrades) without real transactions.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=1357.0)
  - [**Metric Definition:** The `Citation Share` metric's denominator will use all tracked brands (public & private) to provide a more accurate, less misleading competitive context.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [**QA Priorities:** Continue QA on prompts (P1 tickets), fix confusing verbiage in the "Context" section, and implement a failsafe for onboarding workflow failures.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding Bug (P0)

  - [**Problem:** Users are stuck on the "confirming categories" step during onboarding when selecting only one subcategory.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** A validation guard checks `subcategory_ids` but the form submits the single selection as `primary_subcategory_id`.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
  - [**Solution:** Concatenate both parameters in the validation guard. Estevão will implement.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
  - [**Related Issue:** Onboarding workflows (e.g., deep research) can fail silently, leaving users on a "loading" screen.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
      - [**Proposed Failsafe:** Allow users to proceed manually and trigger workflows later from the "Context" section.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)

### QA & UX Improvements

  - [**Prompts QA:** Stevie created 3–4 P1 tickets for prompt-related issues that degrade the user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
      - [**Fix Deployed:** A bug causing page reloads and input unfocus on search throttling was fixed.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**"Context" Section Verbiage:** The "Company Overview" and "Product Features" fields have confusing descriptions.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [**Issue:** Text incorrectly states these fields are used for "prompt recommendations," a feature that doesn't exist.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [**Purpose:** The data is intended for enterprise prompt generation and currently feeds the automated persona generator.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
      - [**Decision:** Fix the verbiage; the feature is not worth hiding.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)

### System Updates & Metrics

  - [**Brand Duplication Fix:** Deployed a fix using an `adopt_brand` method. A script will remove private duplicates; public ones remain for a future merge feature.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [**Overview Charts:** The feature is ready to merge pending a decision on the `Citation Share` metric.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
      - [**Decision:** Denominator will include all tracked brands (public & private) to prevent misleading results (e.g., showing 100% share when the true universe is much larger).](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [**Aggregate Analytics:** Jose is building charts for grouped prompt tables.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
      - [**Strategy:** First, try a non-snapshotting approach for speed. If too slow, add a new snapshot type.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Estevão:** Fix the P0 onboarding bug and implement the failsafe for workflow failures.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [**Jose:**](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)
      - [Merge the Overview Charts feature.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
      - [Create a ticket to review all metric definitions using the Notion doc and an LLM.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
  - [**Stevie:** Continue QA, focusing on P1 prompt tickets and fixing "Context" verbiage.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [**Pedro:** Continue working through the P0/P1 ticket backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/69Lz4-qUiGggNxfzP8dho_RsMGwDtoUK?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)

action_items.description: Update onboarding/context copy re: prompt recommendations; remove incorrect claims
Fix onboarding category guard (concat primary+subcategories); add failsafe to manual select on workflow failure
Run script to remove duplicate private brands
Create ticket to review metrics math w/ Notion doc + AI; then update Citation Share to all brands
Merge overview charts PR using all brands for Citation Share
